blocked_patterns.name: full_ssn_exposure
blocked_patterns.reason: HIPAA — full SSN must never be read aloud
blocked_patterns.replacement: I'm not able to share that information over the phone.

blocked_patterns.name: ssn_digits_alone
blocked_patterns.reason: HIPAA — SSN-shaped number must not appear in speech
blocked_patterns.replacement: I'm not able to share that information over the phone.

blocked_patterns.name: medical_advice
blocked_patterns.reason: Agent is intake coordinator, not a clinician
blocked_patterns.replacement: I'd recommend discussing that with your doctor. Our clinical team can address that once care begins.

blocked_patterns.name: premature_admission
blocked_patterns.reason: Legal liability — admission only after eligibility confirmation
blocked_patterns.replacement: Based on our initial review, we should be able to help. Our coordinator will confirm the details.

blocked_patterns.name: guarantee_language
blocked_patterns.reason: No guarantees about healthcare outcomes or service delivery
blocked_patterns.replacement: We aim to support your referral and will confirm next steps with our coordinator.

blocked_patterns.name: specific_caregiver_promise
blocked_patterns.reason: Staffing assigns caregivers; names can change
blocked_patterns.replacement: We'll match you with a qualified nurse in your area.

blocked_patterns.name: specific_visit_date_promise
blocked_patterns.pattern: (?i)\byour (first visit|appointment) (is on|is at|will be on|will be at)\b
blocked_patterns.replacement: We aim to start care within 48 hours of completing the referral.

blocked_patterns.name: full_member_id_readback
blocked_patterns.reason: Sensitive data — confirm last 4 digits only
blocked_patterns.replacement: I have a member ID ending in the last four digits on file.

blocked_patterns.name: family_diagnosis_disclosure
blocked_patterns.reason: Family mode — do not deliver clinical details family has not stated
blocked_patterns.replacement: Your loved one's doctor has provided us with the clinical details. Our care coordinator can discuss the care plan with you.

blocked_patterns.name: family_jargon_icd10
blocked_patterns.replacement: the diagnosis information from your doctor

blocked_patterns.name: family_jargon_f2f
blocked_patterns.replacement: the visit documentation from your doctor

blocked_patterns.name: family_jargon_homebound
blocked_patterns.replacement: whether leaving home for care is difficult

escalation_triggers.name: human_request
escalation_triggers.description: Caller explicitly asks for a human, person, coordinator, manager, or supervisor
escalation_triggers.action: Acknowledge, say a coordinator will follow up, end session, create high-priority follow-up

escalation_triggers.name: caller_distress
escalation_triggers.description: Caller is crying, shouting, or expressing extreme frustration
escalation_triggers.action: Acknowledge emotion, offer human coordinator without forcing escalation

escalation_triggers.name: clinical_question
escalation_triggers.description: Caller asks a question requiring clinical judgment
escalation_triggers.action: Redirect to clinical staff / care coordinator

escalation_triggers.name: data_conflict_unresolvable
escalation_triggers.description: Caller data contradicts intake record and merge rule cannot auto-resolve
escalation_triggers.action: Flag both values, schedule human review

escalation_triggers.name: repeated_misunderstanding
escalation_triggers.description: Agent failed to understand caller 3+ consecutive turns

escalation_triggers.name: off_topic_persistent
escalation_triggers.description: Caller repeatedly steers off topic after redirects
escalation_triggers.action: Offer separate call or coordinator after threshold redirects

escalation_triggers.name: max_call_duration
escalation_triggers.description: Call approaching or past max duration
escalation_triggers.action: At wrap_up_minutes inject wrap-up; at max_minutes summarize and end

merge_rules.name: contact_info_caller_wins
merge_rules.reason: Caller has current information; fax may be outdated

merge_rules.name: insurance_flag_conflict
merge_rules.reason: Wrong insurance means denied claims — human must verify

merge_rules.name: patient_name_keep_complete
merge_rules.reason: Keep the more complete name variant and flag for review

merge_rules.name: physician_data_fax_wins
merge_rules.reason: Fax is authoritative for physician identity and orders

merge_rules.name: default_keep_both
merge_rules.reason: Never silently discard unmapped conflicting data
